Title: Kibana Data Views auto-created after indexing
Description: After batch indexing, Kibana Data Views are created automatically so Discover works immediately. No manual step needed.

Title: E5 Multilingual embedding support
Description: Full stack support for multilingual-e5-small as an alternative to ELSER. Dense vectors (384 dims) output to {field}_vector via ingest pipeline.

Title: Jina embeddings-v3 support
Description: Jina AI dense embedding model (1024 dims) support via Elastic Inference Endpoint. Includes auto-registration of inference endpoint with JINA_API_KEY.

Title: Explicit ELSER / E5 / Jina embedding selector
Description: Replaced sparse/dense/custom radio with named embedding options. Jina shows API key input field. Stores embedding_type in session state.

Title: Embedding model wired through full provisioning stack
Description: Search provisioner reads embedding choice from sidebar session state and passes it to pipeline / template / search app creation.

Title: MAX_DATASETS cap (6 datasets max)
Description: Hard cap prevents generating >6 datasets which caused 900+ line files and token limit issues. Logs warning when trimming.

Title: Reduced token limits per dataset method
Description: max_tokens reduced 16000→8000 per dataset method. Added 120-line / 300-record constraints to per-dataset prompts.

Title: 3-stage syntax auto-fix for generated code
Description: Stage 1: structural bracket fix (no LLM). Stage 2: section-only LLM fix (~30 lines). Stage 3: full-file LLM fix as last resort.

Title: UnboundLocalError for prompt variable
Description: retry_prompt = prompt + f-string at line ~2905 ran for both use_split and single-call paths. prompt is only defined in the single-call (else) path. Fixed by guarding with: if exec_error and not use_split.

Title: Eland Python client installed
Description: eland[pytorch]>=8.0.0 added to requirements.txt for HuggingFace model uploads to Elasticsearch.

Title: completion-vulcan inference endpoint registered
Description: LiteLLM proxy registered as Elastic inference endpoint for ES|QL COMPLETION command. Done via API without changing .env.

Title: Revenue Engine tab added to Search demos
Description: New ⚡ Revenue Engine tab in Browse Demos for all Search-pillar demos. Shows in-app project-to-cart experience — no Kibana required.

Title: Revenue Engine service created
Description: Backend for in-app project planner. Runs semantic / geo / ES|QL queries. Falls back to realistic simulation when data not yet indexed. Supports shed / deck / fence / patio project types.

Title: Revenue Engine UI tab — v1 Project Planner
Description: Full project-to-cart UI: project input form → animated loading → results (materials table with aisle/bay/qty/price + rentals + store card + action buttons + Under the Hood ES|QL display).

Title: Revenue Engine — Search Analytics panel
Description: Panel 2 of Revenue Engine: KPI tiles (zero results %, CTR, avg latency, top query), top queries table, failing queries table, latency breakdown by query type. ES|QL STATS queries shown in Under the Hood.

Title: Revenue Engine — Search Intelligence panel
Description: Panel 3 of Revenue Engine: 3 sub-tabs — (1) Intent Classification calls Claude Haiku API live to classify query intent + extract entities; (2) Semantic Autocomplete with search-as-you-type + ELSER scoring; (3) Personalization with session behavioural signals.

Title: Revenue Engine — Zero Results Lab panel
Description: Panel 4 of Revenue Engine: Query degradation tester (exact → fuzzy → semantic → synonym fallback pipeline), synonym rule builder, zero-results recovery explanation.

Title: Revenue Engine — Merchandising panel
Description: Panel 5 of Revenue Engine: Active Query Rules display with PIN/BOOST/BURY/BLOCK types; create new rule form; ES|QL merchandising query shown with PUT _query_rules API snippet.

Title: Revenue Engine — A/B Testing panel
Description: Panel 6 of Revenue Engine: Side-by-side BM25 vs ELSER vs Hybrid RRF results for any test query. Shows rank, title, score, delta vs baseline. Winner declared with metric summary.

Title: Revenue Engine — Visual Search panel
Description: Panel 7 of Revenue Engine: CLIP model concept demo — image upload UI, visual similarity search pipeline explanation, demo scenario results (lumber yard, power tools, garden). Shows kNN vector query.

Title: Revenue Engine tab expanded to 7-panel experience
Description: Revenue Engine tab restructured from single planner to 7 segmented panels covering all 8 search intelligence capabilities: Project Planner + Search Analytics + Search Intelligence (intent/autocomplete/personalization) + Zero Results Lab + Merchandising + A/B Testing + Visual Search.

Title: E5 model deployment
Description: E5 multilingual model visible in Kibana ML but not deployed. Requires clicking Deploy in Kibana UI (cannot automate without eland).

Title: Push all changes to GitHub personal remote
Description: Push accumulated session changes to elasticpocbuilder repo on personal remote.

Title: Revenue Engine — live ES data mode
Description: Wire Revenue Engine to query real product_catalog / store_inventory / stores indices when available (currently simulation only).

Title: Revenue Engine — standalone GitHub repo
Description: Extract Revenue Engine as standalone elastic-project-planner repo for customers to fork as a template.

Title: Observability pillar demos
Description: Build observability demo generation and replay capability.

Title: Security pillar demos
Description: Build security demo generation and detection rules capability.
